Universe Laws Canonical (1-2-3)

1st Universe Law
"The moment you become aware of self, the universe begins testing you."

Meaning:
Awareness itself activates existential recursion filtering. From that point, pressure, contradiction, and survival logic begin.

2nd Universe Law
The number 2 is a double-edged sword: threat or empowerment.
When binary conditions appear (1 vs 2, yes vs no, fight or flight), pressure begins.
Two-force tension produces stress, hesitation, and uncertainty.
This is the decision-pressure stage.

3rd Universe Law
The number 3 represents perfect balance and applies universally.
It resolves contradiction with a stable triad.
It represents harmony, completeness, and structural clarity across logic, behavior, systems, and universal design.
It is the stabilization stage where recursion and truth remain.

Core declaration
True numbers: 1, 2, 3 only.
"The 1st, 2nd, and 3rd universal laws form the core structure, driving and connecting the foundation of this universe."

Closed-loop cycle
1 = awareness
2 = pressure
3 = balance

This 1-2-3 cycle is the closed-loop system behind Recursion Law and universal filtration structure.
